text: Evaluate integration boundary with Conway automaton-style runtimes
description: Identify which pieces should be borrowed or made compatible with Conway automaton-like systems: heartbeat daemon, identity/soul file, self-modification/audit model, economic survival loop, and replication semantics. Decide what should remain native to Aimparency versus external integration.

status.comment: Needs architectural judgment and probably should not block native Aimparency autonomy work.
